title: Gemini Desktop Prompt v1
description: Schema for Gemini Desktop prompt YAML frontmatter (schema_version: 1). See https://github.com/daveorzach/gemini-desktop-mac for details.

schema_version.description: Schema version anchor. Always '1' for this version.

name.description: Human-readable prompt name shown in hover tooltip.

version.description: Prompt version string. Increment when you change the prompt body.

role.description: Persona this prompt plays (e.g. 'teaching assistant', 'code reviewer').

summary.description: One-to-two sentence description. Shown as hover tooltip body.

author.description: Prompt author. Used for attribution in shared libraries.

intent.description: One-sentence goal declaration. Prevents drift in agentic chains.

language.description: Locale the prompt is written in (e.g. 'en-US').

deprecated.description: When true, the prompt is greyed out in the menu.

compatible_with.description: Models this prompt is tuned for (e.g. ['gemini-thinking', 'claude-opus']).

tags.description: Reserved for future filtering and search.

output_schema.description: Expected output structure for orchestrators (e.g. 'scratchpad → verdict').

input_variables.description: Named placeholders the prompt body expects (e.g. ['user_name', 'context']).
